name: Vegetable Mafe
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a moderately hot oil in a large skillet.
2. Brown the onions and add vegetables one at a time, sautéing each for about a minute before adding the next.
3. Stir in tomato sauce and approximately a cup of water.
4. Reduce heat and simmer until all the vegetables are tender.
5. Remove half a cup of broth and mix it with the peanut butter to create a smooth paste.
6. Return the mixture to the pot and simmer for an additional 15 minutes.
7. Serve over rice.
